case_title: MAURICE DIXON ET AL VS. DIGNITY HEALTH

docket_entries.description: FILED RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT'S CORRESPONDENCE TO THE COURT TO CONSOLIDATE CASES CSM-18-859043 AND CSM-18-858764 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIXON, MAURICE (MINOR) NARD, ROMOND AS TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO MAURICE DIXON ON 12/05/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DIXON, MAURICE (MINOR) NARD, ROMOND AS TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTIMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM- CIVIL [X] EX PARTE : ORDER [X] EX PARTE THE COURT ORDERS THAT ROMARD NARD IS HEARBY APPOINTED AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MAURICE DIXON FOR THE REASONS SET FORTH OF THE APPLICAITON.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIXON, MAURICE (MINOR) NARD, ROMOND ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH

FILED SC-105 REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL RECEIVED AFTER ENTRY OF DISMISSAL ON 12-08-18. PER PRIORITY MAIL ENVELOPE, REQUEST WAS MAILED ON 12/04/18 AT 5:04 P.M. - PER THE COURT'S DELIVERY LOG, ENVELOPE DELIVERED TO THE COURT ON 12/06/18. FILED BY PLAINTIFF NARD, ROMOND AS TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO LLOYD H. DEAR ON HEHALF OR DIGNITY HEALTH 185 BERRY ST # 300 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94107
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-28-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-05-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MAURICE DIXON. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ROMOND NARD. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GABRIELLE CIOFFI, RN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
